name: symbolic

metadata.name: symbolic
metadata.summary: A python library for dealing with symbol files and more.

documentation:
Symbolic
--------

Symbolic is a Python library that can work with debug symbol files.

documentation: Represents a token matched or looked up from the cache.

documentation: Constructs a sourcemapcache from bytes.

Gives access to a sm cache.

functions.name: symbolic.utils.common_path_join
documentation: Joins two paths together while guessing the platform (win vs unix).

documentation: Strips `prefix` from `a`.

documentation: Calls rust method and does some error handling.

documentation: Encodes a SymbolicStr

functions.name: symbolic.utils.encode_path
documentation: Encodes a path value.

functions.name: symbolic.utils.decode_uuid
documentation: Decodes the given uuid value.

functions.name: symbolic.utils.encode_uuid
documentation: Encodes the given uuid value for FFI.

functions.name: symbolic.utils.make_uuid
documentation: Converts a value into a python uuid object.

classes.name: symbolic.utils.SliceReader
documentation: A buffered reader that keeps the cache in memory

documentation: Returns the UUID of the file.

documentation: Remaps the given class name.

documentation: Remaps the given class name.

documentation: Remaps the stackframe, given its class, method and line.
Gives access to proguard mapping files.

documentation: treat unknown attribute names as exception types

A cache for call frame information (CFI) to improve native stackwalking

Given an instruction and meta data attempts to find the best one
by using a heuristic we inherited from symsynd.

documentation: Constructs a sourcemap from bytes of JSON data.

Looks up a token from the sourcemap and optionally also
